chunks.title: Daniel and Friends Taken to Babylon
chunks.reason: Describes the siege of Jerusalem, the selection of youths, and their renaming.

chunks.title: Daniel's Dietary Test
chunks.reason: Contains Daniel's request for vegetables and the subsequent ten-day trial.

chunks.title: Success Before the King
chunks.reason: Summarizes their wisdom, standing before Nebuchadnezzar, and Daniel's longevity.
